name: Japanese Noodle, Shrimp and Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 large Cucumbers, peeled and halved, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
For the Dressing: Whisk together rice wine vinegar, soy sauce, vegetable oil, sugar, and mustard in a small bowl. Season with cayenne pepper. (Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover and leave at room temperature).
For the Salad:
1. Blanch bean sprouts in boiling water for 30 seconds. Drain and refresh in cold water.
2. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add noodles and cook until tender, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes. Drain noodles.
3. Refresh noodles in cold water. Drain and place in a large bowl. Add sesame oil and toss to coat. (Can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate bean sprouts and oriental noodles separately).
4. Add bean sprouts, shrimp, cucumbers, and onions to noodles.
5. Drizzle with dressing.
6. Gently toss to combine.
7. Line platter with cabbage leaves and mound salad in the center.
